jobs.title: Senior Python Backend Developer
jobs.jd:
Senior Python Backend Developer - 3+ years experience.
Required Skills: Python, Django, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, REST APIs, Git, Linux
Nice to have: CI/CD, Redis, Kafka
Education: B.Tech/M.Tech CS
Experience: 3-5 years

jobs.title: React Frontend Developer
jobs.jd:
React Frontend Developer - 2+ years.
Required Skills: React, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, REST APIs, GraphQL, Git, Agile
Nice to have: Node.js, Next.js
Experience: 2+ years

jobs.title: ML Engineer
jobs.jd:
ML Engineer - 2+ years.
Required Skills: Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, Pandas, NumPy, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, NLP, Docker, AWS
Education: M.Tech preferred

jobs.title: Data analyst
jobs.jd: Analyze business data, create dashboards, generate reports, and provide insights to support decision-making using SQL, Excel, and visualization tools.

jobs.title: Data Scientist
jobs.jd: We are seeking a Data Scientist to build predictive models and perform advanced analytics on large datasets. The candidate should have strong knowledge of Python, machine learning algorithms, statistics, and data preprocessing techniques. Experience with TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, and SQL databases is preferred. Responsibilities include model development, performance evaluation, and presenting insights to business teams. Candidates should have 2–5 years of experience in data science or AI-related projects.

jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer
jobs.jd: The Machine Learning Engineer will design, train, and deploy machine learning models for real-world applications. Required skills include Python, deep learning frameworks, model optimization, and cloud deployment. Candidates should understand data structures, algorithms, and software engineering practices. Responsibilities include improving model accuracy, integrating AI systems into applications, and collaborating with development teams. Minimum 2 years of experience in machine learning development is required.

jobs.title: Python Developer
jobs.jd: We are hiring a Python Developer to build APIs and backend systems. Candidates should have experience in Django, Flask, REST APIs, and database management. Responsibilities include application development, debugging, and code optimization. Candidates should have 1–3 years of Python development experience.

jobs.title: Data Visualization Specialist
jobs.jd: The Data Visualization Specialist will create interactive dashboards and business reports using Tableau and Power BI. Responsibilities include converting complex datasets into visual insights and supporting decision-making teams. Candidates should have strong analytical and storytelling skills with 1–3 years of experience.

jobs.title: Cloud Data Engineer
jobs.jd: We are looking for a Cloud Data Engineer with expertise in AWS, Azure, and cloud-based ETL systems. Responsibilities include building secure cloud data pipelines and optimizing storage performance. Candidates should have experience in SQL, Python, and cloud computing technologies with 2–5 years of experience.

jobs.title: ETL Developer
jobs.jd: The ETL Developer will design and manage ETL workflows for enterprise systems. Required skills include Informatica, SQL, and data warehousing concepts. Responsibilities include data extraction, transformation, and maintaining data integrity. Candidates should have 2–4 years of ETL development experience.

jobs.title: SQL Developer
jobs.jd: The SQL Developer will write optimized queries and maintain enterprise databases. Candidates should be skilled in relational databases, stored procedures, and performance tuning. Responsibilities include troubleshooting database issues and supporting backend applications. Candidates with 1–3 years of database experience are preferred.
